name: Ratio Tech
description: AI-driven subscription billing and B2B SaaS financing platform combining billing with flexible payment terms.

seo.title: Ratio Tech — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Ratio Tech: AI-driven subscription billing and B2B SaaS financing platform combining billing with flexible payment terms.

when_to_use: Flexible B2B payment terms (net-30/60/90) tied to SaaS billing
Revenue-based financing embedded in subscription billing flow
AI-driven subscription billing with deferred payment options

pros: Combines billing with embedded B2B financing
Upfront cash on multi-year deals improves runway
Useful for early-stage SaaS closing annual prepays
cons: Narrow niche; not a full billing replacement
Credit underwriting limits which deals qualify
review.verdict: Interesting financing-plus-billing hybrid for SaaS trading margin for cash; not a standalone billing choice.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS needing upfront cash on annual contracts and willing to pay financing fees.
review.not_for: Teams with strong cash positions or simple self-serve monthly subscription models.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
